title: Pan Seared White Fish with Spicy Tomato Pan Sauce
ingredients: 2 pounds tilapia, red snapper, or orange roughy fillets
½ tsp dried crushed red pepper
1 cup Kalamata olives, pitted and coarsely chopped
instructions: Heat oil in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sprinkle fish with Old Bay seasoning, salt and pepper.
Add fish to skillet and saute until just opaque in center, about 3 minutes per side, cooking in batches if needed.
Transfer fish to platter and keep warm in oven at lowest setting.
Add red pepper and parsley to same skillet, saute for 1 minute while scraping up bits from the skillet.
Add tomatoes, olives, and garlic to skillet and saute for 2-3 minutes.
Season sauce with salt and pepper to taste.
Ladle sauce over fish to serve.
notes: Keep cooked fish warm in the oven while making the pan sauce to prevent it from cooling.
